name: Priority Trust
description_short: Priority Trust Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering competitive auto loans, personal loans, mortgages, credit cards, and deposit accounts with rates as low as 4.05% APR on auto financing.
description_long:
Priority Trust Credit Union is a federally-insured credit union celebrating its 96th year of operation as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution. The organization serves members through a comprehensive suite of financial products and services designed to provide alternatives to traditional banking. Their marketing emphasizes personalized service and competitive rates, particularly highlighting their auto lending program as a core product offering.

The credit union offers a broad range of financial products including checking and savings accounts, personal signature loans and lines of credit, auto loans for vehicles 2018 or newer, motorcycle financing, ATV/4-wheeler loans, RV and camper financing, mortgages (through partnership with Member Home Loans), two Visa credit card options, and financial education resources. They also provide auto buying services through an Enterprise Car Sales partnership and a preferred dealer network, plus insurance products and member counseling services.

Priority Trust distinguishes itself through multiple rate discounts (0.25% for automatic payments, 0.50% for 20% down payment on vehicle loans), extended loan terms (up to 84 months for auto loans), and specialized loan products for members with credit challenges (Second Chance Signature Loans at 18% APR). The credit union actively communicates fraud alerts and security information to members, as evidenced by their alerts regarding fake cashier's checks and impersonation scams.

As a credit union, Priority Trust operates on a member-owned cooperative model rather than shareholder-profit model, theoretically aligning incentives with member benefit. However, their personal loan rates (9.00-15.99% baseline) and credit card rates (12.25-18.00%) fall within competitive but not exceptional ranges. The organization's website provides transparent rate disclosure and product information, though some products like deposit account rates are not publicly displayed on their rates page.
services: Auto loans (2018 or newer, up to 84 months, 4.75-17.99% APR)
Motorcycle loans (2018 or newer, up to 72 months, 6.45-17.99% APR)
ATV and 4-wheeler loans (2018 or newer, up to 60 months, 7.00-15.99% APR)
Personal signature loans (up to 60 months, 9.00-15.99% APR)
Line of credit products (up to 60 months, 11.99-15.99% APR)
Second Chance signature loans (up to 18 months, 18.00% APR)
Platinum Rewards Visa and Secured Visa credit cards
Mortgage services (through Member Home Loans partnership)
Auto buying services and preferred dealer network
Financial education and member counseling resources
pros: Auto loan rates start at 4.05% APR with additional discounts available (0.25% for autopay, 0.50% for 20% down)
Extended auto loan terms up to 84 months reduce monthly payment burden
Member-owned credit union structure with NCUA insurance protection
Second Chance loan products available for members with damaged credit at fixed 18% APR
Broad product suite including auto, personal, motorcycle, RV, and ATV financing in one institution
Transparent rate disclosure with specific APR ranges and discount details publicly available
Active member communication about fraud risks and security threats
cons: Personal loan rates baseline at 9.00% APR with maximum reaching 15.99%, limiting competitiveness for well-qualified borrowers
Credit card APR rates (12.25-18.00%) are on the higher end of market offerings
Second Chance loans require automatic payment and a pledge of up to $500, creating additional barriers
Website does not publicly display savings account or CD rates, limiting transparency on deposit products
Membership eligibility criteria not clearly stated on website
best_for: Credit union members seeking auto financing with competitive rates and flexible terms
Borrowers with fair to good credit who qualify for rate discounts through autopay and down payment
Individuals with past credit challenges seeking Second Chance personal loan products
Members looking for comprehensive financial services including loans, deposits, mortgages, and insurance in one institution
diagnosis: Priority Trust Credit Union is best for existing or prospective members seeking moderately-priced auto, personal, or mortgage financing with extended terms and flexible qualification options, particularly those with fair credit or credit challenges. The main caveat is that while their auto rates are competitive, personal loan and credit card rates are not exceptional compared to other credit unions, and the institution does not publicly disclose deposit account rates or membership eligibility criteria.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Priority Trust — Credit Union in Houston, TX | CreditDoc
meta_description: Priority Trust — NCUA-insured credit union in Houston, TX. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
